programme.title: E208 - The Crew Builds A Smoothie Shop / The Crew Builds A Dino Roof Party
programme.desc: Cafe Carl opens up a smoothie shop on the boardwalk! But when the coaster causes coconut chaos, Rubble & Crew know just what to do. // Rubble & Crew work together to find a construction solution when Charger's bouncy birthday surprise needs a lift!

programme.title: E115 - Pups Save A Hoedown / Pups Save Alex
programme.desc: It's Adventure Bay Western Days, when a herd of cows escape from a train at the railway station! // When their friend Alex decides he wants to be a member of the PAW Patrol the PUPS and Ryder let him come along for the ride.

programme.title: E116 - Pups Save A School Day / Pups Turn On The Lights
programme.desc: Alex loses his back pack on the first day of school! Ryder and the Paw Patrol need to help him find it. // It's Chase's birthday and the pups are planning a surprise party. A storm causes the power to go out!

programme.title: E224 - The Puppet / Gloop Gloop Ah-Ah
programme.desc: The Barbababies decide to create a show and go all out! // Barbotine wants to create the best lemonade.

programme.title: E408 - Mascota Mobile / Kite Festival
programme.desc: Dora is about to give her pets a bath when the pet-washing truck goes haywire, and she has to save pets throughout the rainforest! // Dora and Boots save a mouse in time for him to show off his giant kite at the Rainforest Kite Festival.

programme.title: E111 - The Grass Is Always Greener... / When I Grow Up
programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: E701 - Sparkle's Big Rescue
programme.desc: When Crusher sends Blaze away with one of his latest cheats, Blaze's little sister Sparkle comes to save the day and bring her brother back in time so they can race together to win the Teamwork Trophy!

programme.title: E112 - The Crew Does A Home Renovation / The Crew Builds A Lighthouse
programme.desc: The pups are starstruck when their favorite TV renovation star, Hank Hammer, comes to see them at work. // Cap'n Turbot is bringing Mayor Greatway a big surprise. But when a thick fog rolls in, the pups have to build a lighthouse fast!

programme.title: E726 - Pups Save Thundermouth / Pups Save A Class Pet
programme.desc: Shortly after listening to the story of Thundermouth, the pups are on a mission to save elephants spooked by a scary noise. // Mayor Goodway is left in charge of a class pet, but the hamster escapes! Now it's up to the Paw Patrol to save the pet.

programme.title: E202 - Cookies
programme.desc: Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him.

programme.title: E202 - The Crew Builds A Train Station / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Sign
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the first train station in Builder Cove just in time to welcome Farmer Zoe's new cow Mooreen. // Popstar Sierra Sparkle is moving to Builder Cove! But when the pups plan a surprise greeting, Speed Meister makes a plan of his own.

programme.title: E101 - Lucky Croc / Sleepover Croc
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile search for a lucky item to help them win a bike raffle. // When Mr. Crocodile can't fall asleep at his first sleepover, Daisy helps him figure out why.

programme.title: E105 - Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: E111 - Hiccups
programme.desc: George gets hiccups when he drinks his juice too quickly, so Peppa tries to cure him.

programme.title: E106 - The Playgroup
programme.desc: Peppa and George are going to daycare. It's George's first day at daycare, and he shows the class his interest in dinosaurs.

programme.title: E210 - The Crew And Skye Build A Mountain Lodge

programme.title: E101 - The Barbapapa Tree / The Barbababies' Birthday
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama return to the tree they were born under. It's in bad condition. They must rescue it quickly without disturbing the nearby animals. // It's the Barbababies's birthday. They all want to do something different with Barbapapa!

programme.title: E14 - Welsh Rarebit And Home Fries
programme.desc: Leila Albert interviews Philippe Frenoi, world champion welsh rarebit and chips fan. Together they prepare the dish that crowned him champion: a welsh rarebit revisited with pulled pork, served with chips.

programme.title: E35 - Grillemont - Le Clos Luce
programme.desc: The Grillemont castle, near Tours, is a former fortress transformed into an 18th-century residence. The Clos Luce, also near Tours, is famous for having been the home of the renowned Leonardo da Vinci.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: It's the return of the fresh pasta challenge! Marie-Philip Poulin, hockey player and Olympic medalist, asks the contestants to prepare lasagna.

programme.title: E4 - So Ugly
programme.desc: Christian welcomes actor Marc-Andre Grondin, writer Chrystine Brouillet, and chef Jean-Michel Leblond to cook foods considered 'unappetizing.' From offal to snails, they explore unusual flavors.

programme.title: E3 - Mouscron

programme.desc: Yvan Hallouin explores Parisian places and projects that highlight inclusion. How do these initiatives promote equal opportunity and show that diversity is truly a strength?

programme.title: E211 - iGive Away a Car
programme.desc: The gang runs a contest on iCarly -- the prize is a new car courtesy of a local dealership. After Nevel wins, the kids discover that the dealership had no knowledge of the contest or the free car they were supposedly donating.

programme.title: E312 - Gown and Out / Breaking Dad
programme.desc: When Lola advances to a regional pageant she worries she could lose for the first time. // Dad has Mr. Grouse watch Lily while he goes to a concert but things quickly start to go wrong

programme.title: E217 - Spot Returns / The Check-Up
programme.desc: When his pet amoeba Spot has puppies, Plankton decides to use them in another of his nefarious plots. // Mr. Krabs is too scared to get his physical, but if he doesn't pass, the Krusty Krab will be shut down!

programme.title: E616 - Hiccups and Downs / The Loathe Boat
programme.desc: Luna needs to get rid of a nasty case of the hiccups before a big rock competition. // The Morticians Club plan Bertrand's escape from the cruise ship his parents work on.

programme.title: E298 - Momageddon / Pet the Rock
programme.desc: The Krusty Krew get lazy when their moms take over the Krusty Krab. // Patrick's new pet rock catches the eye of a mischievous rock collector.

programme.title: E507 - Cow Pie Kid / Saved by the Spell
programme.desc: Lynn pushes Liam to his limits when he becomes the star pitcher for the middle school baseball team. // Lincoln's friends try to stop him from performing a magic act at the middle school talent show.

programme.title: E210 - Fed Up / Shell Shock
programme.desc: Tired of monotonous meals, the kids make a plan to sabotage dinner so they can have pizza. // Lincoln and Ronnie Anne have to take care of an egg baby but Lincoln doesn’t trust her with the fragile egg.

programme.title: E102 - Faulty Powers
programme.desc: After a training accident causes a glitch in Chloe's powers, Max and Phoebe look for a cure. After Max thinks he's solved the issue, he allows Chloe to attend a party with friends, but his treatment creates brand new powers Chloe can't control.

programme.title: E20 - The Yoga Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels have arrived and they're all a little bit hyped up with bundles of energy. Things are starting to get a bit frantic, and Duggee needs to calm them all down. Fortunately, he has his Yoga Badge.

programme.title: E31 - Timgad Ruins, Algeria
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit Timgad in Algeria, but someone is playing games with their click-ons.

programme.title: E21 - Duck Hotel
programme.desc: Duck wins a trip for two to a rather exciting hotel, and he finds that he settles in much quicker than Sarah.

programme.title: E9 - The Diary Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels find a dusty, old book behind a cupboard... it's Duggee's diary from when he was a teenager! The Squirrels are keen to write diaries of their own.

programme.title: E3 - Frog Song
programme.desc: It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse.

programme.title: E22 - Whale Watching
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: E93 - Cold
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po are outside in the cold when they spot the Tiddlytubbies who are warm, inside. The Teletubbies put on hats, gloves and scarves to keep warm.

programme.title: E37 - The Zip Express
programme.desc: The friends board the Zip Express, a train that takes them across Pop Paper City. But when the friends face an unexpected challenge, it's unknown if the train will reach their destination on time.

programme.title: E31 - Woolly Memories
programme.desc: Scarf Lady's old film reels get themselves in a tangle, so Sarah and Duck decide to recreate the footage.

programme.title: E6 - Gordon Gets The Giggles
programme.desc: Gordon becomes very worried when he gets a serious case of the giggles. He must find a way to control his laughter before it does any damage.

programme.title: E23 - Shops
programme.desc: Playing 'Shops' is the best game ever for Bluey and her friends - if they can ever get started! With Bluey questioning the rules and changing who's who, they might be here all day!

programme.title: E24 - Wagon Ride
programme.desc: Bluey can't wait to get to the monkey bars as Dad takes her and Bingo on a wagon ride to the park. But her patience is tested when Dad keeps stopping to chat with other grown-ups.

programme.title: E25 - Taxi
programme.desc: Bluey is running a taxi service. Her first passenger is Businessman Dad, who is in a rush to get to the airport. But with unexpected delays, Dad's in danger of missing his flight!

programme.title: E11 - Spooky Day
programme.desc: Supertato runs in fright when Pumpkin tries to make friends with him, but later realises she needs his help as she's stuck in the air hanging from balloons set up by Evil Pea.

programme.desc: Glitch visits Broadway, while the Go Jetters tackle a huge cloud of smog in Central Park.

programme.title: E14 - Bullet Train, Japan
programme.desc: All aboard for a high-speed adventure, as the Go Jetters visit Japan's Bullet Train.

programme.desc: The team race to save Glitch when his kite flies too close to the academy's windfarm.

programme.desc: Mason is cooking a recipe named after the place it comes from: Yorkshire. Mason serves his recipe with broccoli, and lots of gravy.

programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the jungles of Australia in search of a cassowary. Along the way, they meet some wild budgerigars.

programme.title: E3 - Annabel's Austrian Kaiserschmarren
programme.desc: Annabel is making a dessert called Kaiserschmarren served with blueberries and raspberries. Annabel wears a traditional dress and invites her friends to her Austrian chalet.

programme.title: E8 - African Penguins
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Cape town, off the coast of South Africa, on a global adventure to find out why African penguins are living in the city.

programme.title: E9 - The Big Day
programme.desc: Seaweed is excited because today is THE BIG DAY, but he's forgotten what THE BIG DAY actually is. Can Captain Captain and Sandy help him remember?

programme.title: E27 - Seesaw
programme.desc: Dad has rudely plonked himself on one end of the seesaw. So Bluey and Bingo round up the entire playground to help move him off, but they still need to find one more friend.

programme.title: E11 - Evil Pea's Party Plan
programme.desc: It's Evil Pea's birthday, but she and Carrot are trapped in the bottom of her freezer. They must put their differences aside and work together to escape.

programme.title: E3 - Frog Song
programme.desc: It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse.

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: Tasked with swaying Azai retainer Miyabe Keijun (Donpei), Tokichiro is confronted with an impossible demand: a child to be taken hostage. Childless himself, he attempts to offer the child of Tomo (Miyazawa Emma), only to provoke her fury and be forced to turn to Koichiro instead. Meanwhile, the defeated Azai Nagamasa and Asakura Yoshikage (Tsurumi Shingo) seek refuge at Enryakuji Temple, leading Oda Nobunaga to order the temple's destruction if it refused to submit.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.desc: Talk Africa is a weekly discussion show that brings the most influential voices in Africa to the world.

programme.title: Trip to Burkina Faso
programme.desc: In Burkina Faso, our heroes' penfriend Jamal can't wait to introduce Zoe and Milo to his parents, and like Alim, he appears to have several mums and dads. What a mystery!

programme.title: Abraca-Doki
programme.desc: When amateur magician Doki accidentally makes Gabi's worm vanish, Gabi is in a panic. How can they bring Lancelot back? To find out, Team Doki travels to a magic show in Las Vegas, Nevada to ask for help from a real magician named The Fantabulous Fenn.

programme.title: Plastic Spoon
programme.desc: Hepi and Briko reuse spoons to make some cute DIY's.

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Troubadours and Minstrels
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, listening to music for entertainment is a much-appreciated pastime. Singers and musicians of that era travel round Europe singing their poetry. Famous minstrel Howler is a huge hit at a fiery banquet in his lordship's court.

programme.title: A4 Paper
programme.desc: Blank paper? No problem, Hepi and Briko are full of ideas.

programme.title: Mountain of Rubbish
programme.desc: Too many inexperienced climbers are trying to scale the famous peak of Mont Blanc - putting themselves in danger and leaving rubbish everywhere. The MeteoHeroes have to clean up that mountain! Ventum and Nix are going on their next mission.

programme.title: Albert The Great Detective
programme.desc: Albert's obsessed with Sherlock Holmes and believes he shares his hero's detective skills. The others aren't so sure-except Jessi. When the class hamster vanishes from a locked cage, Albert takes the case, Jessi by his side. Robbie's the prime suspect... but is he guilty?

programme.title: Bridge
programme.desc: Help Pooch get over the gap by building a nice strong bridge! We're here to support you.

programme.title: What's that smell?
programme.desc: When the kids discover that Yoko is the cause of an awful smell, they have to convince him to take his very first bath!

programme.title: Fossil Finds
programme.desc: Eric learns that fossils are like fingerprints left behind by prehistoric plants or animals. He makes some modern-day fossils using toy dinosaurs and flour.

programme.title: Stars in a Jar
programme.desc: Eric learns constellations are groups of stars and that they often have shapes that look like animals, objects, or even people. He makes a lantern that can project the constellation Ursa Major, also known as the Great Bear because it looks like a big bear in the sky.

programme.title: Membranes
programme.desc: In this episode, Dr Chris and Dr Xand look at cell membranes, and show you an experiment to make eggs bounce!

programme.title: Actually, It's An Estimate
programme.desc: An approximation is the nearest estimate if we don't know the exact size of something. In this episode, we learn how accurate estimates come about by using clues and information about things in our everyday lives.

programme.title: The Wildlife Hospital
programme.desc: Poppy, the cat, needs urgent dental surgery before she finds a new home. Hundreds of chickens get a bath, and at the wildlife hospital, the Junior Vets treat a rabbit with an injured leg and some baby starlings who have lost their mum.

programme.title: Brain Drain
programme.desc: When Darwin qualifies for the Kiwifruit Valley Brain Games finals, he studies to exhaustion, and learns that our brains work best well-rested.

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: What's that smell?
programme.desc: When the kids discover that Yoko is the cause of an awful smell, they have to convince him to take his very first bath!

programme.title: A4 Paper
programme.desc: Blank paper? No problem, Hepi and Briko are full of ideas.

programme.title: The Feast of Fools
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, life may be tough, but having fun is also on the agenda! Folly Festival is a carnival where everyone sings and dances, but also has fun trading places. Howler becomes a princess for the day, and Little Lewis a lord.

programme.title: Treacherous Waters
programme.desc: The Nektons enter an area of the Bermuda Triangle where the laws of physics don't seem to apply. What's more, they can't escape!

programme.title: Troubadours and Minstrels
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, listening to music for entertainment is a much-appreciated pastime. Singers and musicians of that era travel round Europe singing their poetry. Famous minstrel Howler is a huge hit at a fiery banquet in his lordship's court.

programme.title: Bridge
programme.desc: Help Pooch get over the gap by building a nice strong bridge! We're here to support you.

programme.title: Hearing
programme.desc: In this episode, Dr Chris and Dr Xand look at hearing, and show you an experiment to see a sound wave in action!

programme.title: Bernoulli and Company
programme.desc: Eric learns how the Bernoulli Principle and playing with the flow of air can help him inflate a plastic bag. This same principle explains how airplanes fly, too.

programme.desc: Help Pooch get over the gap by building a nice strong bridge! We're here to support you.

programme.desc: Mahadev is a man of principles, leading a strict household as the family head! But bound to fly high, his children rebel, and a generational clash ensues!

programme.desc: Shivaay bravely fights off goons to protect a life-saving injection for Aadhya. Days later, when Aadhya regains consciousness, Baldev is filled with guilt for the harm he caused her.

E1 - Day One
programme.desc: Fresh out of the FBI Academy, Simone Clark arrives in Los Angeles and has her sights set on joining Matthew Garza's newly formed special unit as they investigate the murder of a federal engineer.

programme.title: E16 - Out Of Time
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: E1 - Gut Instinct
programme.desc: The discovery of two missing U.S. Navy aviators adrift in the Coral Sea leads the team to expose a sinister terrorist plot.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 非物質文化遺產即某地區文化傳承有重要意義的行為或表現，如民俗、文化、信仰、傳統等各種智慧財產；為了全面展示保護的成果，推動高品質發展，節目打造以非物質文化遺產傳承為主題，令更多人認識及發揚光大。

programme.title: E2 - 孫紅雷單膝跪地向謝娜求婚
programme.desc: 沉浸式IP推理真人秀，由謝娜、黃子韜、寧靜、古力娜扎、孫紅雷、孫千、徐志勝組成「萌探家族」，他們將根據一部經典IP，進行實景還原、改編等演繹原劇片段，通過劇情的疑點及遊戲環節，獲取劇情線索，尋找劇情真相！

programme.title: E10 - 甜妹唱戲腔反差拉滿
programme.desc: 突破傳統音樂綜藝節目模式，創新性地將舞台設立在郵輪上，從中國上海啟航，途經沖繩、越南、新加坡、馬來西亞，最終抵達香港；吸納數百名來自亞洲各國的00後新銳唱將，他們將在Jessie J、張靚穎、張信哲、尤長靖所組成的「新聲團」，及近百位亞洲各國音樂人的見證下，開啟一次巡迴亞洲的音樂競演！

programme.title: E10 - 付出的真心變笑話？
programme.desc: 以「尋找勢均力敵的參與者」為核心模式，通過團隊協作任務獲取生存物資，個人競技爭奪約會權，並設置淘汰機制與心動投票綁定規則；素人嘉賓們將逃離都市，直面愛情與生存的挑戰，在人群中尋找勢均力敵的彼此。

programme.title: E2 - 各國強推的神奇網站
programme.desc: 一檔外國人用中文搞事情的文化訪談類節目，由4名主席團成員大左、楊迪、陳銘及陳超，1名飛行嘉賓與10名不同國家的青年代表聚集在一起，以詼諧態度和調侃精神，增進中國與世界文化的交流，圍繞社會話題及各國風俗文化進行討論。

programme.title: E10 - 付出的真心變笑話？
programme.desc: 以「尋找勢均力敵的參與者」為核心模式，通過團隊協作任務獲取生存物資，個人競技爭奪約會權，並設置淘汰機制與心動投票綁定規則；素人嘉賓們將逃離都市，直面愛情與生存的挑戰，在人群中尋找勢均力敵的彼此。

programme.title: E25 - Vote For Leloup!
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: E43 - Restorer
programme.desc: To gain a better understanding of some professions, school children explain jobs to their parents in their own words.

programme.title: E44 - Fib After Fib
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: E17 - The Golden Daisy
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: E27 - Axolotl
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera S1
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Citizen Pinoy
programme.desc: Filipinos around the world hope to immigrate to the US, legalize their status in the US, or be reunited with their family in the US after years of separation. In this public service program, Attorney Michael J Gurfinkel explains, in plain English, the intricacies of US immigration laws and procedures, as well as advises of avenues to immigrate and developments in US immigration laws. Just because you're half a world away from home, you can still get answers to your US immigration questions.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 《祝卿好》改編自伊人睽睽的小説《我的錦衣衞大人》，講述了刁蠻嬌憨又霸道的長樂郡主劉泠偶遇武功高強的冷峻金麟衞沈宴，展開花式追逐的故事。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 《祝卿好》改編自伊人睽睽的小説《我的錦衣衞大人》，講述了刁蠻嬌憨又霸道的長樂郡主劉泠偶遇武功高強的冷峻金麟衞沈宴，展開花式追逐的故事。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 《膽小鬼》電視劇是由檸萌影業、優酷聯合出品，鄭執編劇，張曉波執導，歐豪、王硯輝領銜主演，王玉雯、周依然、侯雯元主演的青春懸疑犯罪短劇集。該劇改編自鄭執的長篇小說《生吞》，該劇講述了一段四個少年的青春往事，多年後一樁重現的罪案，讓所有人不得不面對人性最真實的「黑白戰爭」。

programme.title: E5 - Locked Away
programme.desc: During a welfare check, authorities discover a man has been living with the mummified bodies of his family. Pathologists cannot determine if they died naturally or if something nefarious occurred.

programme.title: E6 - Dark Influences
programme.desc: Shocking first-hand accounts of people who were manipulated, abused, and finally broke free before it was too late. We'll hear from former members of Gwen Shamblin's Remnant Fellowship, and more.

programme.title: E9 - Killed For The Cash
programme.desc: When a Texas gas store owner, Subir Chatterjee, 58, is shot inside his cheque-cashing booth in 2002, detectives suspect his killer is someone Subir knew.

programme.title: E12 - Even In Cuffs I Look Good
programme.desc: A young man is taken into custody for public intoxication, while a woman is arrested for lying to police. In Modesto, a teen is hit with a felony charge for criminal threats of violence.

programme.title: E8 - Kids Who Kill - Alyssa Bustamante
programme.desc: Troubled teen Alyssa Bustamante was a self-styled 'bad girl' who said she wanted to know how it felt to kill. She gave in to this curiosity and murdered her nine-year-old neighbour Elizabeth Olten.

programme.title: E154
programme.desc: An irate plaintiff storms out of her virtual hearing and is charged with contempt; a quadruple murderer sobs uncontrollably at sentencing; a judge breaks down laughing at a defendant's complaints.

programme.title: E118 - Meet Up For Murder
programme.desc: After an immigrant, lured by a woman, is beaten to death, Gwinnett County Police discover that one of the three suspects believes no one will care about him because he's Mexican.

programme.title: E9 - Negligent Midwife Or Responsible Caregiver?
programme.desc: An unlicensed midwife assists a home birth that ends in tragedy. The defence says she made the right calls, but the prosecution charges her with negligent child abuse resulting in death.

programme.title: E3 - I Saw The Devil
programme.desc: November 23, 2014, Springfield, Oregon. A housekeeper at the Village Inn Motel calls police when she finds a guest unresponsive and cold to the touch.

programme.title: E4 - Ben Stiller
programme.desc: World-renowned survivalist Bear Grylls meets actor Ben Stiller (The Secret Life of Walter Mitty (2013)) on the rugged mountains of the Isle of Skye in Northern Scotland, to go on a once in a lifetime adventure. As they explore their surroundings, Bear tests Ben's limits in an effort to see how he measures up to the unpredictable and unforgiving challenges of Mother Nature.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Climate change is our defining crisis, and it is happening even faster than we thought. But we're not powerless to stop it. The impacts of climate change are felt in every corner of the world. Increased temperatures are causing environmental disasters. The sea levels are rising, the Arctic is melting, coral reefs are dying, oceans are acidifying, and forests are burning. It is clear that business as usual is not an option. With climate change reaching irreversible heights, now is the time for bold collective action. The climate emergency is a race we are losing, but it is a race we can win.

programme.title: E5 - Bad Brakes
programme.desc: Josh narrowly avoids disaster driving into the mine with a load of fuel and Claudia’s devastated when a jade slab cracks in half while she’s running the saw.

programme.title: E6 - Right Under Our Nose
programme.desc: Claudia and Robin scramble to find a second jade boulder before their buyer backs out of the deal, but they’re running out of time and options.

programme.title: E4 - Ben Stiller
programme.desc: World-renowned survivalist Bear Grylls meets actor Ben Stiller (The Secret Life of Walter Mitty (2013)) on the rugged mountains of the Isle of Skye in Northern Scotland, to go on a once in a lifetime adventure. programme.title: E6 - Drill vs. Super Metal
programme.desc: Episode 106 of Showdown on the Unbeatables features the Stang water blaster versus Ultra Every Dry’s water repellent coating; the Republic Lagun VGC 4428 smart drill versus HPA’s super alloy; and the Harris Hawk versus the XFactory X6 remote controlled racecar.

programme.title: E7 - Wander Woman
programme.desc: After losing both her parents and battling an eating disorder, Paige turns to an adventure with Bear Grylls to regain her confidence in life. On this emotional journey, she reconnects with herself and the memories of her outdoor-loving dad.

programme.title: E1 - David Attenborough: A Life on Earth
programme.desc: The incredible journey and illustrious career of one of the most travelled men in history, this documentary tells the story of how Sir David Attenborough came to be the voice of modern natural history programs by bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Climate change is our defining crisis, and it is happening even faster than we thought. But we're not powerless to stop it. The impacts of climate change are felt in every corner of the world. Increased temperatures are causing environmental disasters. The sea levels are rising, the Arctic is melting, coral reefs are dying, oceans are acidifying, and forests are burning. It is clear that business as usual is not an option. With climate change reaching irreversible heights, now is the time for bold collective action. The climate emergency is a race we are losing, but it is a race we can win.

programme.title: E5 - 105
programme.desc: Today on Million Dollar House Hunt we meet house hunter Bec and her son Quin who are looking for a multi million dollar property in Toorak, Melbourne

programme.title: E5 - Bad Brakes
programme.desc: Josh narrowly avoids disaster driving into the mine with a load of fuel and Claudia’s devastated when a jade slab cracks in half while she’s running the saw.

programme.title: E6 - Right Under Our Nose
programme.desc: Claudia and Robin scramble to find a second jade boulder before their buyer backs out of the deal, but they’re running out of time and options.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Major transport in an open-cast mine. A huge steel frame has to be moved to another site. A job for heavy transport professional Randolf Peters. The route: an obstacle course. Tight bends, steep downhill sections and obstructing power lines have to be overcome. The heavy transport has to be kept in sight every second. This means running backwards for kilometres and precision work with heavy transport equipment.

programme.title: E4 - Ben Stiller
programme.desc: World-renowned survivalist Bear Grylls meets actor Ben Stiller (The Secret Life of Walter Mitty (2013)) on the rugged mountains of the Isle of Skye in Northern Scotland, to go on a once in a lifetime adventure. As they explore their surroundings, Bear tests Ben's limits in an effort to see how he measures up to the unpredictable and unforgiving challenges of Mother Nature.

E4 - Big Cats, Big Trouble
programme.desc: Dodge a leopard with the Manzi dogs while they treat themselves to a stolen feast. No such luck for the Kakuli pack on the hunt, as they’re foiled by a brave puku antelope. Find the stork pack, and retreat from charging elephants with Jules and Simon.

programme.title: E1 - The Wilds of Winter
programme.desc: Endure winter and early spring on the west coast, where animals eke out a chilly existence. Watch red deer battle on windswept Inishvickillane, welcome seal pups amid howling storms on the Inishkea islands, and view the return of the basking sharks.

programme.title: E3 - Invisible World
programme.desc: Dive into a dazzling world beyond human perception, where animals use their super senses to detect light we can’t see, sound we can’t hear and even stranger forces we can’t begin to detect.

programme.title: E1 - Waterhole
programme.desc: Witness clashes over precious resources when the dry season brings a band of gladiators to an African savannah watering hole. See a lion-elephant territory brawl, an ant raid on a termite mound, and a honey badger’s risky dance with a deadly snake.

programme.title: E4 - Tidelands
programme.desc: Head to America’s far north for a peek at the ultimate fighters that live along its waterways. See a spring thaw kick off the competition, pitting eagles against herons, bears against bears, and dragonfly nymphs against venomous giant water bugs.

programme.title: E1 - The Ghost of the Mountains
programme.desc: Navigate the harsh Mongolian wilderness with Dan as he searches for The Dude, the largest snow leopard ever recorded. Watch him battle hostile landscapes and uncertainty as he sheds light on the challenges that The Dude and other snow leopards face.

programme.title: E3 - Collar Complications
programme.desc: Rejoin the team for some post-rainy-season drama as they search for Ferinha, Fera, and Badalo, whose tracking collars are missing. Meet a new biologist who helps Lizzie recollar the jaguars, adding a high-tech device that will record even more data.

programme.title: E1 - The Ghost of the Mountains
programme.desc: Navigate the harsh Mongolian wilderness with Dan as he searches for The Dude, the largest snow leopard ever recorded. Watch him battle hostile landscapes and uncertainty as he sheds light on the challenges that The Dude and other snow leopards face.

programme.title: E3 - Collar Complications

programme.title: E5 - The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Film a wild dog hunt with Julz as he catches up with the Manzi pack at a kill, and watch for leopards and hyenas as the Kakuli pack takes great risks while waiting for the rains to come. Go on an epic hunt with a returning male of the Stork Colony.

programme.title: E2 - Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: The Nsefu lion pride welcomes seven new cubs during the wet season, when antelope and buffalo are spread far from the river, making them harder to hunt. Learn how the mother lionesses work to keep the boisterous cubs alive.

programme.title: E1 - Into the Heat
programme.desc: Meet the unlikely collaborators working to ensure mutual survival in the Kalahari Basin. Learn of an elephant clan’s symbiotic link to fruiting anaboom trees, a meerkat’s alliance with a feisty drongo bird, and more flora-and-fauna odd couples.

programme.title: E3 - Behind the Lens
programme.desc: Track scientists who have arrived in the Kalahari to test a hypothesis: that animal collaboration is the key to the dizzying diversity of the region’s species. Observe as they monitor behavior, decipher data, and deliver fascinating conclusions.

programme.title: E751
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary college girl finds herself reincarnated as a background extra in a romance novel, only to spend a night with the story's most dangerously obsessive male lead. A romantic fantasy with no brakes begins!

programme.title: E1289
programme.desc: The best tunes in Korea! the most sensational music show on TV satisfies all your senses! Fantastic performances and Awe-inspiring harmony by the nation's top musicians! Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.desc: Eight-year-old Rafi was left with brain damage after suddenly falling seriously ill. After spending a year in hospital, he finally came home - but the house is not equipped to meet his complex needs.

programme.title: Bury Me High
programme.desc: This is a film about one of the practical metaphysics of the Orient - Geomancy. The Orientals believe fervently that a good burial site endows fame and fortune on its descendants. When the story begins, two geomancers are roaming Indochina's wilderness trying to find the dream grave site. They find The Conqueror, a site generating wealth and power - also a bloodbath. Nguen wants it but Wei wants no bloodbath. They have a fight. Wei escapes by the skin of his teeth. Wei rewards the poor man who saved him by finding him a good grave site. Many years later, Anna who is believed to be the daughter of the poor man, heads an American computer empire. Wei's son, Wisely, is a famous traveler. The girl asks him to go to Indochina to trace their roots...

programme.title: To Be Number One
programme.desc: The story of Ho, a chinese peasant/slave worker who escapes to Hong Kong and becomes one of the most feared crime bosses in Hong Kong.

programme.title: Born Wild
programme.desc: Twin brothers Tan and Tide had been fought for the best until Tan died. Tide investigates the death and meets Tan's lover Sandy. Tide finds himself being attracted to her warmth...

programme.title: Superstars Sunday: The Island
programme.desc: The story takes place on a deserted island. The only residence on the island is a family in which the mother ruled over three of her sons: Tai Fat, gloomy and sullen; Yee Fat, vulgar and cruel; Sam Fat, slightly retarded. Mother's earnest wish is to find a wife for Sam Fat to continue the family tree. Teacher Cheung, along with six of his students arrive on the island for camping. They first meet Yee Fat who brings them to the grocery for a rest. Yee Fat is delighted with the presence of the 3 young girls while Sam Fat falls in love at first sight with the charming girl Phyllis. He expresses his feelings to Tai Fat who has sworn to his mother that he will fulfill her wish to find his youngest brother a wife. He proposes to Cheung that Phyllis be married to Sam Fat. Cheung first thinks that it's a joke, but soon senses that Tai Fat is serious and that all three brothers are actually psychologically imbalanced...

programme.title: To Be Number One
programme.desc: The story of Ho, a chinese peasant/slave worker who escapes to Hong Kong and becomes one of the most feared crime bosses in Hong Kong.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E153
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. programme.desc: A new trafficking route is preying on African ambition. From Africa to Northern Cyprus and the battlefields of Ukraine, fake agents sell dreams of jobs, study and migration, then deliver coercion, debt, forced labor and war.

programme.title: Hope After Loss
programme.desc: Nothing prepares us for the devastating loss of a loved one. The grief is overwhelming. And it doesn't go away quickly. Some say it never will. But sometimes women successfully turn their grief into action. They do something meaningful that not only transforms their own lives, but possibly the lives of many others.

E94 - The Slap/The Detective/The Fury/The Compilation/The Disaster
programme.desc: Tobias follows every high-five with a butt-slap, so when Gumball doesn't get one he feels insulted. He tries to get Tobias to slap his rear all day, but when it doesn't work he decides they need some enforced one-on-one bro-time to build their relationship up to a butt-slap.

programme.title: E15 - A Fun Day At The Bowling Center/Umbrellas Are Easily
programme.desc: One of the pins at the bowling alley is the Bobobobobone. Shiro wants to play, but he has bigger responsibilities. Deca arrives and throws Shiro like a bowling ball.

programme.title: E99 - The Re-Run/The Stories/The Guy/The Boredom/The Choices
programme.desc: When we last saw Gumball, he was hitting rewind on Rob's Universal Remote, just in time to save himself from being trapped in The Void. The remote has now taken Gumball back to the beginning of that disastrous day. Armed with the knowledge of what this day has in store, he must try and stop Rob from destroying his life.

E1 - Rainy Day Earth Week Fun
programme.desc: It's rainy day Earth Week fun with Little Baby Bum! Mia & Max help a spider climb the water spout & then splash in puddles when the rain stops! Then, they watch a caterpillar transform into a beautiful butterfly. The nature adventures continue as they listen to nocturnal animal sounds, build a bird bath & help ants collect crumbs for a picnic!

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Music
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E1 - Rainy Day Earth Week Fun
programme.desc: It's rainy day Earth Week fun with Little Baby Bum! Mia & Max help a spider climb the water spout & then splash in puddles when the rain stops! Then, they watch a caterpillar transform into a beautiful butterfly. The nature adventures continue as they listen to nocturnal animal sounds, build a bird bath & help ants collect crumbs for a picnic!

programme.title: E2 - When Cute Creatures Cause Big Chaos!
programme.desc: Watch out, because these cute creatures are causing big chaos! First, Chroma the Magic Pet has a cold, & every time she sneezes, she causes a huge color splat! Mila & Morphle must find her before the whole city is covered in color. Then, the Baby Morphles arrive from another dimension & they are in the mood for a game of chase! From a giant living doll to a runaway magic pet, these cute creatures are causing chaos everywhere!
